problem: What material is biocompatible, conductive, and flexible enough for long-term brain implants?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to long-term, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
